svg.aria-label: William Zujkowski's GitHub profile terminal — security engineer, multi-agent AI builder (nexus-agents), basement-datacenter homelabber in southern PA, and dad-joke connoisseur. A playful animated terminal session with live weather, live GitHub stats and languages, and a rotating dad joke. The theme rotates daily.
svg.title: William Zujkowski's GitHub profile terminal — security engineer, multi-agent AI builder (nexus-agents), basement-datacenter homelabber in southern PA, and dad-joke connoisseur. A playful animated terminal session with live weather, live GitHub stats and languages, and a rotating dad joke. The theme rotates daily.
svg.desc:
william@homelab:~$ cat /etc/motd WILLIAM'S DEV TERMINAL v2026.05 Security • Multi-Agent AI • Homelab • Dad Jokes Sunny 65°F | Humidity: 47% william@homelab:~$ neofetch --ascii_distro homelab william@homelab OS: DadOS LTS (Linux + Coffee) Shell: /bin/dad-jokes Uptime: 20+ years (one continuous session) Role: Security Engineer • Multi-Agent AI • Homelabber Location: southern PA — basement datacenter Languages: TypeScript, Python, Go, Rust Editor: nvim (btw)
● ● ● ● ● ● ● ● william@homelab:~$ status --me
✓ nexus-agents online · multi-model ✓ homelab racks healthy ✓ vuln-briefing shipped ⚠ coffee refill required ✓ dad-joke buffer overflowing
william@homelab:~$ gh api users/williamzujkowski --jq '.public_repos,.followers' GITHUB: @williamzujkowski Repos: 88 Followers: 25 Following: 51 Gists: 134 Member since: Sep 2015 william@homelab:~$ gh lang --top 6 Python ███████░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 36% TypeScript ██████░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 31% Shell ██░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 9% JavaScript █░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 7% HTML █░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 5% Go █░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 4% william@homelab:~$ exercise --dad \o/ | / \ william@homelab:~$ fortune | dad DAD JOKE OF THE DAY - May 30 Category: AI Q: Why did the LLM go to therapy? A: It had too many hallucinations! william@homelab:~$ logout Thanks for stopping by — may your builds stay green, your agents stay aligned, and your coffee stay hot. See you in the commits.

g.text: ║ Security • Multi-Agent AI • Homelab • Dad Jokes ║
║ DAD JOKE OF THE DAY - May 30 ║
║ Q: Why did the LLM go to therapy? ║
║ A: It had too many hallucinations! ║
║ Thanks for stopping by — may your builds stay green, ║
║ your agents stay aligned, and your coffee stay hot. ║
